name: Post Ship Audit Elevation
summary: After every substantive PR merges, run a 2-pass audit: (1) Gap pass — what's incomplete, deferred, fragile, untested in what just shipped; (2) Elevation pass…
description: After every substantive PR merges, run a 2-pass audit: (1) Gap pass — what's incomplete, deferred, fragile, untested in what just shipped; (2) Elevation pass — what would the most ambitious version of this feature look like. Present as numbered lists; wait for user pick before implementing.
author: marvelousempire
goal: Deliver post ship audit elevation output correctly and completely.
